question: Which of the following best describes the change in population in Region P from 2006 to 2016?

options.A: It generally increased despite some fluctuations.
options.B: It generally decreased despite some fluctuations.
options.C: It remained nearly constant over the years.
options.D: It first decreased and then increased sharply after 2010.

explanation: The inverted Y-axis makes the series appear decreasing when it is actually increasing.
